title: Netify Network Interface Stats Telemetry
description: JSON Schema for Netify Agent v5 network interface and global stats telemetry.

oneOf.description: Per-interface statistics object keyed by interface name.

type.description: Telemetry record type for per-interface statistics.

oneOf.description: Global statistics object summarized across all monitored network interfaces.

type.description: Telemetry record type for summarized global statistics.

capture_dropped.description: Total number of packets dropped by the packet capture layer.

capture_filtered.description: Total packets filtered out (removed) in the case where Berkely Packet Filters are in use.

discarded.description: Total packet counts being discarded prior to entering the DPI engine for analysis. An example is an unsupported protocol like NetBEUI.

ethernet.description: Total number of supported Ethernet header counts seen.

flow_dropped.description: Total number of packets dropped during flow processing.

fragmented.description: Number of fragmented IP packets observed.

ip_bytes.description: Total number of bytes carried in IP packets.

queue_dropped.description: Total number of packets dropped due to internal queue limits.

raw.description: Total number of raw packets captured on the interface.

tcp_resets.description: Total number of TCP reset (RST) packets.

tcp_seq_errors.description: Total number of TCP sequence errors.

vlan.description: Total number of VLAN tagged packets.

wire_bytes.description: Total number of bytes observed on the wire, including frame overhead.
